avatar: Coaches, creators, and small-business owners who post on Instagram but have a tiny or non-existent email list. They know "the money is in the list" but feel behind, overwhelmed by tech, and unsure what to even offer people to get them to subscribe. They're time-poor and allergic to anything that smells like complicated marketing software.
main_problem: They're renting their audience on social and own nothing. One algorithm change and they're invisible. But every "grow your list" guide assumes ads, landing-page builders, or a lead magnet they don't have time to make — so they stall and never start.
main_promise: In two weeks, using only the audience and tools they already have, they can set up a simple subscribe system and run one "list sprint" that gets them their first few hundred subscribers — on the way to 1,000. The win we're selling: seeing real people join their list from a single Reel.
core_deliverables: The 3-Line Opt-In — a fill-in-the-blank formula for a subscribe offer people actually want, built in 15 minutes without a designer or a lead-magnet marathon (centerpiece)
The List Sprint Plan — a 7-day content + DM plan that turns existing followers into subscribers
The No-Tech Setup Guide — the simplest free way to collect emails and deliver the opt-in, with zero funnel software
bonus_deliverables: 20 Opt-In Hooks — swipeable one-liners that make people want to subscribe (kills the "I don't know what to say" objection)
The Welcome Email Template — the one email that turns a new subscriber into a fan, ready to paste
order_bump: $11 "Reels-to-Subscribers Pack" — 10 done-for-you Reel scripts whose only job is to drive email signups. A natural, low-cost add-on to the core system.
future_upsells: "List to Launch" program that monetizes the list
A monthly membership with fresh monthly sprints
buyer_objections: "I don't have a lead magnet / time to make one." (The 3-Line Opt-In needs no lead magnet.)
"I'm not techy." (No-Tech Setup Guide uses one free tool, no funnels.)
"My audience is too small." (The sprint works with even a few hundred followers.)
"Email feels old / dead." (It's the one channel they actually own.)
roi_logic: Price it at $24. A single client or product sale down the line pays it back many times, and a list is an asset they keep forever. Cheaper than one month of most funnel tools.
tone: Encouraging, plain-spoken, a little bit "you've got this." Talk like a friend who's a step ahead, not a marketing bro. No hype.
ethical_boundaries: No subscriber-count guarantees and no income promises — results depend on their audience and effort. We promise the system and that they'll have a working subscribe setup by the end. No fake scarcity.
delivery_format: Instant digital delivery: a Google Drive folder with PDFs, the fill-in worksheets, and a short welcome video. Access emailed automatically right after purchase.
